response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings over 20 years of broad engineering experience and genuine entrepreneurial initiative, but falls significantly short of the role's core requirements. The position demands director-level AI strategy leadership with recognized expertise in AI and cloud platforms; the candidate's AI exposure is limited to recent MCP tooling work starting in 2025 with no demonstrated history of building or leading AI-powered products at scale. There is no cloud architecture depth, no advisory or enterprise customer-facing experience, and the overall profile is that of a senior/staff hands-on engineer rather than a director-level individual contributor capable of shaping organizational AI strategy.
strengths: 20+ years of engineering experience spanning web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure — comfortably satisfies the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record with GISCollective (self-founded, open source, deployed to real NGO users) demonstrates a builder and founder mindset aligned with the role's intrapreneurial preference
Active knowledge-sharing through workshops and a conference talk at FOSS4G shows early external thought leadership and communication ability
concerns: AI expertise is shallow and very recent — MCP tooling and agentic workflow work began only in 2025 with no prior history of building, shipping, or leading AI-powered products or platforms
No meaningful cloud architecture or cloud strategy depth; AWS CDK usage at Optilyz is transactional infrastructure tooling, not evidence of cloud platform expertise or strategy

Profile is firmly hands-on engineering at senior/staff IC level with no demonstrated experience advising enterprise customers, influencing organizational AI direction, or operating at director-equivalent scope

key_factors.factor: AI expertise depth and track record
Seniority gap and strategic leadership experience
Entrepreneurial and multi-domain builder track record
